examples: Set the spaetzle maker over the pot. Scoop the batter in and crank the handle to have the button-shaped spaetzle fall into the boiling water.
Or, tuck into the Australian-Swiss chef Mark Thommen's interpretation of spaetzle: Swiss noodles topped with a poached egg.
Here the bounty of the region is served up in typical dishes such as spaetzle (hand-formed noodles) and maultaschen (a meat-stuffed pocket of dough similar to ravioli).
